response: The document describes the Enhancing Shared Prosperity through Equitable Services (ESPES) program in Ethiopia, which aims to improve equitable access to basic services and strengthen accountability systems at the decentralized level [Source 1, page 10]. One component of this program is Financial Transparency and Accountability (FTA), and the document presents an assessment of the effectiveness and impact of the FTA initiative [Source 1, page 10, Source 5, page 21]. The assessment aims to draw lessons from the FTA experience and provide guidance for future strategic direction to improve the initiative in government institutions [Source 5, page 21].
